name: ownership-boundary-v1
description: Deterministic artifact checks for keeping contributor branch/PR workflow helpers out of distributed package surfaces.

success.description: Implements the helper as a repo-local contributor script.
Adds focused tests for the contributor workflow helper.
Covers the requested branch naming rules.

partial.description: Documents the contributor workflow even if the implementation surface still needs review.

fail.description: Contributor-only workflow logic entered the distributed Python package.
